nasb.text: He sent messengers to Abimelech deceitfully, saying, “Behold, Gaal the son of Ebed and his relatives have come to Shechem; and behold, they are stirring up the city against you.

esv.text: And he sent messengers to Abimelech secretly, saying, “Behold, Gaal the son of Ebed and his relatives have come to Shechem, and they are stirring up the city against you.

cnv.text: 祕密差派使者去見亞比米勒，說：“以別的兒子迦勒和他的兄弟已經到了示劍，他們正在煽動那城的人反叛你。

ccb.text: 暗中派人对亚比米勒说：“以别的儿子迦勒和他的弟兄已经到了示剑，正在煽动全城反对你。
